# keyAttributes

**Instance Property**

An array containing zero or more key attributes for an imported key.

## Declaration

```swift
var keyAttributes: Unmanaged<CFArray>?
```

## Discussion

Valid values are [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrIsPermanent], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrIsSensitive], and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrIsExtractable]. If you set this attribute array to `NULL`, the following defaults are used:

- The item is marked permanent if a keychain is specified.
- The item is marked sensitive if it is a private key.
- The item is marked extractable by default.
title: keyAttributes
